opinion.h4: LAMB v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 578. Decided January 7, 1963.
opinion.p: Reported below: 204 Cal. App. 2d 255, 22 Cal. Rptr. 284.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: WILLIAMSON v. HOPEWELL REDEVELOPMENT & HOUSING AUTH., 371 U.S. 234 (1963)
opinion.p: 371 U.S. 234 WILLIAMSON ET AL. v. HOPEWELL REDEVELOPMENT & HOUSING AUTHORITY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF APPEALS OF VIRGINIA. No. 582. Decided January 7, 1963.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Lewis S. Pendleton, Jr. for appellants.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
